name: malwoverview
desc: Malwoverview is a first response tool for threat hunting across VirusTotal, Hybrid Analysis, URLHaus, Polyswarm, Malshare, Alien Vault, Malpedia, Malware Bazaa…
descFull: Malwoverview is a first response tool for threat hunting across VirusTotal, Hybrid Analysis, URLHaus, Polyswarm, Malshare, Alien Vault, Malpedia, Malware Bazaar, ThreatFox, Triage, IPInfo, Shodan, AbuseIPDB, GreyNoise, URLScan.io, Whois/RDAP, NIST, and VulnCheck. Supports LLM enrichment, IOC extraction, YARA scanning, and Android analysis.
